A. Any prior valid reservations or conveyances of oil, gas and other minerals in, on
and under the herein conveyed lands.

B. All governmental regulations and ordinances, including all zoning ordinances of

The Grantors warrant and represent unto the Grantee as follows, to wit:

1. The property herein conveyed is not a part of Grantors’ homestead.

2. L. D Garmer is deceased.

EXECUTED ON THIS the 26th day of August, A.D., 2004.

Glen Garner

6 Betty Carolyn G. McPhail

STATE OF MISSISSIPPI)
)
COUNTY OF MARION )

PERSONALLY APPEARED before me, the undersigned authority in and for the said
county and state, on this 26th day of August, 2004, within my jurisdiction, the within named GLEN
GARNER and BETTY CAROLYN G. McPHAIL, who acknowledged that they executed the above

and foregoing instrument.

My commission expires:
